subcodes.first_line: O thou who yearnest for the Beauty of the All-Glorious! Night and day, with the utmost lowliness and supplication, beseech thou at the threshold of the Self-Sufficing Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق جمال ذوالجلال در شب و روز بکمال عجز و نیاز بدرگاه حضرت بی نیاز تضرع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @humility; meekness; lowliness
